question: Based on this chart, what can be concluded about the revenues in 2021 and 2022?

options.A: It is not possible to tell whether 2021 or 2022 has higher revenue because their bars extend beyond the shown axis range.
options.B: 2021 and 2022 have exactly the same revenue.
options.C: Revenue in 2021 is clearly higher than in 2022.
options.D: Revenue in 2022 is clearly higher than in 2021.

explanation: The y-axis maximum is set below the data maximum, so the top bars are clipped and appear equal; the true values cannot be compared from the chart alone.
